overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a foggy, open grassland at night. The scene features dense volumetric fog with extremely low visibility and a mysterious diffuse light source breaking through clouds in the distance, rendered in a game engine with cinematic atmospheric horror aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy open grassland at night with distant ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the foggy field toward the distant light source, navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: dense volumetric fog covering the entire scene, limiting visibility to approximately 20 meters and creating an ominous atmosphere
uneven grassy ground with patches of brown dirt and scattered dead vegetation
diffuse white-blue light source breaking through heavy cloud cover in the distance, providing minimal ambient illumination
clumps of tall dried grass and small bushes sporadically dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a desolate, fog-shrouded grassland at night. Dense volumetric fog limits visibility while a mysterious diffuse glow emanates from the distant center of the frame. Sparse vegetation including tall grass clumps occasionally passes by on the periphery as the viewer progresses through the eerie, low-light environment toward the unknown light source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded grassland at night toward a mysterious distant glow. It begins by pushing steadily through a dense, volumetric fog that severely limits visibility, creating an eerie and oppressive atmosphere. As the camera progresses, sparse clumps of tall grass occasionally flicker past on the periphery, grounding the movement within the low-light environment. The scene then draws closer to the center of the frame, where a diffuse light source begins to break through the haze, guiding the viewer deeper into the unknown.
